name: moneyflow-mcp
description: Query money flows between state, citizens, and enterprises. Simulate policy changes, compare cohorts, check data confidence.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Optional API key for higher rate limits

tools.name: moneyflow_list_templates
tools.description: List available actor templates (households, enterprises, government) with optional filtering

tools.name: moneyflow_find_template
tools.description: Find the best actor template by class, search term, NACE code, or size class

tools.name: moneyflow_get_flow_path
tools.description: Get money flow path between nodes — shows all intermediate stops, splits, and sources

tools.name: moneyflow_get_splits
tools.description: Show outgoing flow distribution of a node — where does the money go?

tools.name: moneyflow_simulate
tools.description: What-if simulation: change a macro factor and compute cascade effects

tools.name: moneyflow_compare_cohorts
tools.description: Compare two cohorts/templates for significant differences in flows and splits

tools.name: moneyflow_get_confidence
tools.description: Get source and confidence information for a node's edges

tools.name: moneyflow_get_graph_stats
tools.description: Get graph statistics: templates, sectors, coverage, data sources
